revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-530

A system consisting of

a. a metal tube

b. a dielectric rod or tube, or

c. a single wire

for the transmission of electromagnetic energy by a wave not of TEM type.

Reference: D.I.N. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
